status.summary: Tyrion-in-a-box quality gates for AI-generated code; 1.0 is out, 1.1 wraps up the verb-driven workflow and the buff/scour split. Completed config help/error improvements, gate enablement fixes, Windows build fix, PR #221 ready for merge (all review feedback resolved, coverage gates passing).
blockers: Pre-existing starlette security vulnerability (PYSEC-2026-161) in myopia:dependency-risk.py — needs resolution before v1.1.0 release.
Pin GitHub Actions in barnacle templates to commit SHAs before tagging v1.1.
next: Merge PR #221 once security issue is addressed or scoped out.
Cut v1.1.0 once the buff helper has docs and one more dogfooded PR.
Publish the `sm sail` walkthrough to the docs site.

agent.status: PR #223: CI fix pushed — black 88-char wrap in test file
agent.direction: Two fixes: PYSEC-2026-161 starlette pin and dead-code.js knip 6 JSON format compat + ignore_patterns/ignore_dependencies. CI was failing due to a long line in test_javascript_dead_code.py; now fixed.

actions.name: Fix dead-code.js knip 6 JSON envelope + add ignore_patterns/ignore_dependencies

Wait for CI to pass and merge PR #223
